I'm a Growth Strategist

EdTech Nepal

Open to Work

Who I am

About me

How I work

I'm an organized, adaptable Project Coordinator with 7+ years steering cross-functional programs, learner engagement, and operational workflows in Nepal's EdTech sector. Clear goals, complex execution — that's where I thrive.

Known for keeping timelines, documentation, and people aligned without letting details slip.

The partnership approach

I lead Growth & Partnerships at Skill Shikshya as Organizational Relationship Manager & Student Engagement Coordinator — cultivating B2B relationships with 80+ colleges and 50+ IT companies across Nepal, from first conversation to signed MoU to delivery.

I understand institutional constraints and corporate expectations — and how to make both sides feel they've won.

Outside partnerships, I hold a BSc (Hons) in Computer Science (University of Wolverhampton — Herald College, Kathmandu) and a Diploma in Information Technology, alongside a long-running side of my life in Nepali Sign Language interpretation and inclusive education — including representing Nepal at the Global Disability Summit 2024 in Berlin with VSO Nepal, GIZ, and BMZ Germany.
